title: Skorp-Ion
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Skorp-Ion.jpg]] |name=''Skorp-Ion'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=Equipped |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=2+ [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=Pilot (1) |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|A good Jedi doesn't ''need'' possessions anyway.''"
"''You have ''your'' ship!''"
"''Yeah, but I'm not a very good Jedi, am I?|[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|''[[Star Wars: Republic: Dreadnaughts of Rendili]]''}} The '''''Skorp-Ion''''' was the personal ship of [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] during his time as a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] double-agent. [[Tol Skorr]], jealous of Vos, always desired it. Following the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]], [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]] flew it to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to await the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. {{Ship-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 54|''Republic'' 54]] {{1st}} *''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' *[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] *[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] *[[Republic 68|''Republic'' 68]] *[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] *[[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Skorp-Ion }} [[Category:Starships of the Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Republic]] [[Category:Starships of the Jedi Order]]
